title: ObsidianOverhaul
description: Obsidian Overhaul is a Minecraft mod that adds a brand-new set of tools and armor made from obsidian.
body:
🔥 Obsidian Overhaul

Obsidian Overhaul expands obsidian and crying obsidian into a full progression system, adding new tools, weapons, armor, and decorative blocks while staying close to vanilla gameplay.

The mod gives obsidian-based materials a real purpose beyond portals by turning them into powerful late-game content that fits naturally into survival progression.

🧱 Features

Obsidian & Crying Obsidian tools

Obsidian & Crying Obsidian weapons

Obsidian & Crying Obsidian armor

Storage blocks and many decorative building blocks

Crying Obsidian is designed as the strongest tier for end-game progression.

⚔️ Spears (Minecraft 1.21.11)

With the introduction of spears in Minecraft 1.21.11, the mod adds:

Obsidian Spear

Crying Obsidian Spear

These spears follow vanilla spear mechanics and integrate naturally into the obsidian progression.

🧱 Building & Decoration

Includes obsidian-themed blocks such as stairs, slabs, walls, doors, trapdoors, fences, gates, and polished variants—perfect for dark, fortified builds.

⭐ Why Obsidian Overhaul?

Vanilla-friendly progression

Late-game and end-game content

Consistent with Minecraft updates

Balanced for survival and modpacks
